executives.name: Annette Clayton
executives.background: Former Chief Executive Officer and Chair of Schneider Electric North America.

executives.name: Jennifer Parmentier
executives.background: Ms. Parmentier has served as Chief Executive Officer since January 2023 and Chairman of the Board since January 2024. She previously served as Chief Operating Officer from 2021 to 2022 and Vice President and President – Motion Systems Group from 2019 to 2021.

executives.name: Lee Banks
executives.background: Former Vice Chairman and President of Parker-Hannifin Corporation. He served as President and Chief Operating Officer from 2015 to 2022.
